creator: godevilove@ya.ru
text:
Seems like this is a known bug for xfce: https://bugzilla.xfce.org/show_bug.cgi?id=12864
Although the issue in their issue tracker is still not closed - it seems to be dependent on the gtk3 version used by the system and the bug doesn't reproduce with more recent gtk3.

So, please, add an update for port/pkg of gtk3.
